channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Waltz: 'It is up to President Trump' to determine if Iran violated ceasefire
item.description: Retired Adm. McRaven: There's no ceasefire "when you're shooting at each other."

item.title: WATCH: Five passengers are the first to leave the hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius
item.description: The passengers dressed in protective clothing and masks were escorted to the shore and expected to continue on flights back to their home countries.

item.title: Full transcript of "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," May 10, 2026
item.description: On this "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" broadcast, Energy Secretary Chris Wright and Sen. Mark Kelly join Margaret Brennan.

item.title: Netanyahu wants to phase out U.S. military aid | 60 Minutes
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu tell 60 Minutes he wants Israel to eventually stop relying on U.S. military aid: "It's time that we weaned o...
